calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Jury Trial/Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Harold Dees, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Beverly J. Martin, Catrina Martin and ishmael Jihad aka Ishmael Jaha.
Exhibit 1 - Sublease Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Amended Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1251-B Exposition Dr., San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $6,549.10
Waived Costs
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT CATRINA MARTIN.
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BEVERLY J MARTIN (IN HOSPITAL PER CATRINA)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
